splash_welcome_subtitle: Kebele services made simple for you
choose_language_subtitle: Select the language you want to use in the app.
book_subtitle: Fill in your details and choose an appointment date.
phone_validation: Please enter a valid phone number.
booking_confirmed_message: Your appointment has been saved locally.
appointment_success_subtitle: Please keep your appointment number for editing or cancellation.
edit_subtitle: Update your phone number or appointment date.
cancel_subtitle: Look up your appointment number and cancel if needed.
appointment_not_found: No active appointment found with that number.
cancel_confirm_message: This action will mark the appointment as cancelled on this device.
feedback_subtitle: Tell us how we can improve the service experience.
feedback_thanks: Thank you for sharing your feedback.
about_app_message: A frontend-only mobile app for Kebele service appointments.

new_id.title: New ID
new_id.short: Apply for a new resident identification card.
new_id.full: Book an appointment to apply for a new Kebele resident identification card.

id_renewal.title: ID Renewal
id_renewal.full: Schedule a visit to renew an expired or nearly expired Kebele identification card.

lost_id.title: Lost ID Replacement
lost_id.short: Request a replacement for a lost ID card.
lost_id.full: Submit a replacement request for a lost Kebele identification card.

birth_certificate.title: Birth Certificate
birth_certificate.short: Register a birth and receive a certificate.
birth_certificate.full: Book a Kebele appointment to register a birth and receive an official certificate.

marriage_certificate.title: Marriage Certificate
marriage_certificate.full: Schedule a Kebele appointment for official marriage registration and certificate service.

death_certificate.title: Death Certificate
death_certificate.short: Register a death and obtain certificate.
death_certificate.full: Book an appointment to register a death and obtain the required certificate.

instructions.bring_originals: Bring original documents and one copy.
instructions.arrive_early: Arrive at the Kebele office on your selected date.
instructions.use_correct_phone: Use a phone number where the office can reach you.
instructions.old_id_required: The old ID card must be presented during renewal.
instructions.police_report_required: A police report is required for lost ID replacement.
instructions.parent_presence: A parent or legal guardian should be present.
instructions.witness_presence: Witnesses may be requested by the office.
instructions.family_presence: A close family member should submit the request.
